runners.formComment: Was out of placings last time (17.67) at this track in a Class 3, finishing sixth and beaten 4.5 lengths. Has four successes and six minors from 16 starts from box 2. Can measure up on best.

runners.formComment: In the money last time at this track (17.02) in a Class 3, finishing a half a length second. Goes very well from the draw boasting three victories and five places from 12 starts. Racing well and is the testing material.
